headline: PayPal Expands PYUSD Globally As Board Shift Frames Valuation Question
summary: PayPal Holdings (NasdaqGS:PYPL) is rolling out its U.S. dollar-backed stablecoin, PayPal USD (PYUSD), to users in more than 70 countries. The company is extending PYUSD beyond the U.S. to support faster, lower-cost cross-border transfers for consumers and businesses. PayPal has also appointed Alyssa Henry, former CEO of Block’s Square business and former Amazon Web Services executive, to its Board of Directors. For anyone watching digital payments, these moves highlight where PayPal is...

headline: Alyssa Henry to Join PayPal's Board of Directors; Gail J. McGovern to Retire from Board
summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) today announced that Alyssa Henry, former CEO of Block's Square business, has joined the company's Board of Directors. The company also announced that Gail J. McGovern, who has served on the Board since 2015, will not stand for re-election at PayPal's upcoming Annual Meeting of Stockholders in May.

headline: Is It Time To Reassess PayPal (PYPL) After Its Recent Share Price Slide?
summary: If you are wondering whether PayPal Holdings at around US$44 is a bargain or a value trap, this article focuses squarely on what the current price might be implying about the business. The stock has recently shown mixed returns, with a 4.2% decline over the last 7 days, a 6.1% gain over 30 days, and longer term returns of 24.0% lower year to date and 37.3% lower over the last year. These moves come as investors continue to reassess large, established digital payment platforms and their role...
